CompanyInfo.title: Services
CompanyInfo.details: Frontend Development, UI/UX, SEO, Landing Page

ProjectInfo.ObjectivesDetails: Develop a modern, responsive, and accessible institutional website for nutritionist Fernanda Souza, showcasing services, credentials, and client testimonials, with a focus on conversion and user experience.
ProjectInfo.Heading: Challenges
Details: Manage the project hosting and deployment on Netlify, ensuring optimal performance and uptime.
Buying the Domain in Registro BR and configuring DNS settings for seamless website access.
Centralized all content and configuration in a single file for easy updates and maintenance.
Implemented smooth animations with Framer Motion and progressive section loading.
Developed reusable and responsive components, optimized for both mobile and desktop.
Integrated WhatsApp contact buttons and dynamic Instagram feed.
Ensured accessibility, semantic HTML, and performance, following best SEO and WCAG practices.
Customized the visual theme with Tailwind CSS and brand identity (primary pink).
Modular structure for easy expansion of new sections and content.
